details.description: 페이지에 로고 적용 및 프로젝트 배포

summary: Add strict-era completion artifacts for legacy Tier 3 deployment task

details.validation_omission_reason: Legacy deployment task recorded before VALIDATION_RESULT gate existed; report notes Wrangler deployment log verification but no structured Validator event was captured.
details.merge_omission_reason: Legacy task completion did not capture a MERGE_COMPLETED event; original report records task branch usage, but merge evidence is unavailable.
details.session_log_skipped_reason: Legacy task recorded before strict session artifact enforcement; no session log artifact was created.
